displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 2
synopsis: Collects Republic #55-67, Star Wars: Darth Maul – Death Sentence #1-4, and material from Star Wars Tales #22. (Note that this was anticipated to collect Republic with gaps as #55-59, 61, 63-64, 60, & 62, and only collect #65-68 if it also included Jedi – Yoda)
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Clone Wars Vol. 2
